note: Live/updated scores get written here and picked up by the page automatically. Mirrors js/data.js for these match ids until a real update lands.

matches.note: First time the top 4 FIFA-ranked teams have all reached the World Cup semifinals.
Argentina chase back-to-back titles; England chase a first since 1966.
Halftime show curated by Chris Martin, featuring Madonna, Shakira and BTS.
